tags.description: At the end of Beach Crescent off the seawall, the David Lam dock services traffic both directions of the creek. Bikes, wheelchairs and strollers are accessible on any pontoon Aquabus vessel. You can purchase tickets onboard.
tags.name: David Lam Park Terminal

tags.description: Just off the Granville Public Market, the Granville Island Aquabus dock is the hub for all of it's trips. There are two main lineups on this dock, one for Hornby street, and another that services the rest of the creek. You can purchase tickets onboard.
tags.name: Granville Island Terminal (Aquabus)
